ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported metrics */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the data */,
  "hosp" REAL /* Number of hospitalized patients */,
  "icu" REAL /* Number of ICU patients */,
  "deaths" REAL /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "admits" REAL /* Number of admissions to hospitals */,
  "cases" REAL /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "seroprev" REAL /* Seroprevalence rate (proportion of the population that has antibodies) */,
  "rt" REAL /* Effective reproduction number (Rt) */,
  "exposed" REAL /* Estimated number of exposed individuals */,
  "infected" REAL /* Estimated number of infected individuals */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of currently active cases */,
  "total_cases" REAL /* Total number of reported cases */,
  "susceptible_unvax" INTEGER /* Number of unvaccinated susceptible individuals */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Rate of positive tests */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "total_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., public, private, teaching) */,
  "total_doctors" INTEGER /* Total number of doctors in the hospital */,
  "total_nurses" INTEGER /* Total number of nurses in the hospital */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the hospital */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination report */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinated individuals reported */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals fully vaccinated */,
  "partially_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals partially vaccinated */,
  "booster_doses" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the vaccination in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Detailed access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_resources" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported resource metrics */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of hospital beds available */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds available */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds currently available */,
  "icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds currently occupied */,
  "total_ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators available */,
  "ventilators_in_use" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators currently in use */,
  "oxygen_supply" INTEGER /* Level of oxygen supply (in liters per minute) */,
  "pharmacy_stock" TEXT /* Status of the pharmacy stock (e.g., adequate, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id", "date")
)
column_names: Seroprevalence rate (proportion of the population that has antibodies)
Number of new cases reported on the date
Type of hospital (e.g., public, private, teaching)
Total number of doctors in the hospital
Total number of nurses in the hospital
Total number of staff in the hospital
Emergency contact number for the hospital
Total number of vaccinated individuals reported
Coverage of the vaccination in the population
Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, healthcare provider)
Unique identifier for each access log entry
ID of the user accessing the system
Timestamp of when the data was accessed
IP address from which the access was made
User agent string of the access device
Detailed description of the action performed
Date of the reported resource metrics
Total number of hospital beds available
Number of ICU beds currently occupied
Number of ventilators currently in use
Level of oxygen supply (in liters per minute)
Status of the pharmacy stock (e.g., adequate, low)
